Class Phase

java.lang.Object
java.util.Observable
com.risk.model.Phase
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Phase extends Observable implements Serializable
Observable Phase class, store 1) the name of the game phase currently being played 2) the current player's name 3) information about actions that are taking place during this phase
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    clearActionResult()
    Clear current action
    Action
    getActionResult()
    Observer uses it to get the current action within a phase
    String
    getCurrentPhase()
    Observer uses it to set the current Phase label
    Player
    getCurrentPlayer()
    Observer uses it to get the current Player reference, then update the relative part of UI
    static Phase
    getInstance()
    Static get instance method, get the instance, if the instance has not been initialized, then new one
    String
    getInvalidInfo()
    Model call this to set invalid info during each phase
    void
    setActionResult(Action actionResult)
    Model call this to help phase to update UI, show buttons, hide panes, etc i.e. actionResult = Allocate_Army, etc
    void
    setCurrentPhase(String currentPhase)
    Model only update the current phase when the phase changed i.e. currentPhase = "Start Up Phase", "Reinforcement Phase", "Attack Phase", "Fortification Phase"
    void
    setCurrentPlayer(Player currentPlayer)
    Called when the Model change the current player to the next one
    void
    setInvalidInfo(String invalidInfo)
    Model call this to help user to identify the invalid action which is performed during a phase i.e. invalidInfo = "Select one of your own countries", "There is no path between ...", etc
    void
    update()
    Model call this when finish calling any setXXX() method within this class i.e. call setCurrentPhase("Start Up Phase"), then must call update()

    Methods inherited from class java.util.Observable

    addObserver, clearChanged, countObservers, deleteObserver, deleteObservers, hasChanged, notifyObservers, notifyObservers, setChanged

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static Phase getInstance()
      Static get instance method, get the instance, if the instance has not been initialized, then new one
      Returns:
      the instance

    • update

      public void update()
      Model call this when finish calling any setXXX() method within this class i.e. call setCurrentPhase("Start Up Phase"), then must call update()

    • setCurrentPhase

      public void setCurrentPhase(String currentPhase)
      Model only update the current phase when the phase changed i.e. currentPhase = "Start Up Phase", "Reinforcement Phase", "Attack Phase", "Fortification Phase"
      Parameters:
      currentPhase - represent the current phase label name

    • getCurrentPhase

      public String getCurrentPhase()
      Observer uses it to set the current Phase label
      Returns:
      the current phase

    • setCurrentPlayer

      public void setCurrentPlayer(Player currentPlayer)
      Called when the Model change the current player to the next one
      Parameters:
      currentPlayer - is the next Player reference

    • getCurrentPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayer()
      Observer uses it to get the current Player reference, then update the relative part of UI
      Returns:
      the current Player reference

    • setActionResult

      public void setActionResult(Action actionResult)
      Model call this to help phase to update UI, show buttons, hide panes, etc i.e. actionResult = Allocate_Army, etc
      Parameters:
      actionResult - is the action that are taking place during a phase

    • getActionResult

      public Action getActionResult()
      Observer uses it to get the current action within a phase
      Returns:
      the current action

    • clearActionResult

      public void clearActionResult()
      Clear current action

    • setInvalidInfo

      public void setInvalidInfo(String invalidInfo)
      Model call this to help user to identify the invalid action which is performed during a phase i.e. invalidInfo = "Select one of your own countries", "There is no path between ...", etc
      Parameters:
      invalidInfo - is the user invalid action info

    • getInvalidInfo

      public String getInvalidInfo()
      Model call this to set invalid info during each phase
      Returns:
      the invalid info
